fields.name: adOrgId
fields.label: Organization
fields.help: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

validationRule.code: AD_ORG_ID <> '0'

fields.name: cDocTypeTargetId
fields.label: Transaction Document
fields.help: Specifies document subtype (eg. POS Order, Return Material, etc.) that each document (such as Sales Invoice, Purchase Order, etc.). Various document subtypes usually differ on the consequences they have. You can convert document types (e.g. from Offer to Order).  The conversion is then reflected in the current type.

validationRule.code: C_DocType.DocBaseType IN ('ARI', 'API','ARC','APC','ARI_RM') AND C_DocType.IsSOTrx='@IsSOTrx@' AND (AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@,C_DocType.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> '-1' OR COALESCE(@AD_Org_ID@,'-1')='-1')

fields.name: documentNo
fields.label: Document No.
fields.help: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice).  If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

fields.name: dateInvoiced
fields.label: Invoice Date
fields.help: The Date Invoice indicates the date printed on the invoice.

fields.name: cBpartnerId
fields.label: Business Partner
fields.help: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact.  This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

fields.name: cBpartnerLocationId
fields.label: Partner Address
fields.help: The Partner address indicates the location of a Business Partner

validationRule.code: C_BPartner_Location.C_BPartner_ID=@C_BPartner_ID@ AND C_BPartner_Location.IsBillTo='Y' AND C_BPartner_Location.IsActive='Y'

fields.name: mPriceListId
fields.label: Price List
fields.help: Price Lists are used to determine the pricing, margin and cost of items purchased or sold.

validationRule.code: M_PriceList.issopricelist = @isSOTrx@

fields.name: dateAcct
fields.label: Accounting Date
fields.help: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

fields.name: cPaymentTermId
fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.help: Payment Terms identify the method and timing of payment for this transaction.

validationRule.code:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FIN_FinAcc_PaymentMethod fapm WHERE FIN_PaymentMethod.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID=fapm.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID
AND fapm.Payin_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payin_Allow END FROM DUAL)
AND fapm.Payout_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='N' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payout_Allow END FROM DUAL))

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.help: A description is limited to 255 characters.

fields.name: cOrderId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.help: Unique identifier and a reference to a Purchase Order originating from the document sequence defined for this document type.

fields.name: poreference
fields.label: Supplier Reference
fields.help: Supplier invoice number associated with the payment, i.e., which of the supplier’s invoices you are paying

fields.name: docStatus
fields.label: Document Status
fields.help: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.  To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

fields.name: grandTotal
fields.label: Total Gross Amount
fields.help: The Grand Total displays the total amount including Tax and Freight in document currency

fields.name: totalLines
fields.label: Total Net Amount
fields.help: The Total amount displays the total of all lines in document currency

fields.name: cCurrencyId
fields.label: Currency
fields.help: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

fields.name: ispaid
fields.label: Payment Complete
fields.help: The document is paid for.

fields.name: adUserId
fields.label: User/Contact
fields.help: The User identifies a unique user in the system. This could be an internal user or a business partner contact

validationRule.code: AD_User.C_BPartner_ID=@C_BPartner_ID@

fields.name: totalpaid
fields.label: Total Paid
fields.help: Total amount paid.

fields.name: lastCalculatedOnDate
fields.label: Last Calculated on Date
fields.help: Last Calculated On Date for payment monitor

fields.name: taxdate
fields.label: Tax Date
fields.help: Tax Date

fields.name: outstandingAmt
fields.label: Total Outstanding
fields.help: Total Outstanding Amount. Amount pending to be paid

fields.name: dueAmt
fields.label: Amount Currently Due
fields.help: Total amount due

fields.name: dateOrdered
fields.label: Order Date
fields.help: Indicates the Date an item was ordered.

fields.name: daysTillDue
fields.label: Days Till Next Due
fields.help: Number of days left for the next due date

fields.name: salesRepId
fields.label: Company Agent
fields.help: Purchase agent for the document. Any Sales Rep must be a valid internal user.

validationRule.code: AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@, td0.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> '-1'

reference.filterExpression: EXISTS (SELECT * FROM C_BPartner bp WHERE AD_User.C_BPartner_ID=bp.C_BPartner_ID AND bp.IsSalesRep='Y')

fields.name: isDiscountPrinted
fields.label: Print Discount
fields.help: The Discount Printed Checkbox indicates if the discount will be printed on the document.

fields.name: cDocTypeId
fields.label: Document Type
fields.help: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

fields.name: cWithholdingId
fields.label: Withholding
fields.help: The Withholding indicates the type of withholding to be calculated.

validationRule.code:
EXISTS (SELECT 1
              FROM C_BP_Withholding w , C_BPartner b
              WHERE w.C_BPartner_ID=b.C_BPartner_ID
              AND w.C_Withholding_ID=C_Withholding.C_Withholding_ID
              AND W.C_BPartner_ID=@C_BPartner_ID@)

fields.name: cActivityId
fields.label: Activity
fields.help: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

fields.name: isActive
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.name: chargeAmt
fields.label: Charge Amount
fields.help: The Charge Amount indicates the amount for an additional charge.

fields.name: cChargeId
fields.label: Charge
fields.help: The Charge indicates a type of Charge (Handling, Shipping, Restocking)

fields.name: generateTo
fields.label: Generate Receipt from Invoice
fields.help: Create and process delivery Receipt from this invoice.  The invoice should be correct and completed.

fields.name: adOrgTrxId
fields.label: Trx Organization
fields.help: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization).  The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

fields.name: emAprmAddpayment
fields.label: Add Payment
fields.help: Launches a process to add a payment to the selected invoice.

fields.name: posted
fields.label: Posted
fields.help: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not. When doing the accounting manually this button can be used to post or unpost the transaction from the general ledger by hand.

fields.name: emAprmProcessinvoice
fields.label: Process Invoices
fields.help: Process the invoice and executes the payments that can be generated automatically in case is necessary

fields.name: docAction
fields.label: Process Invoice
fields.help: Process Invoice

fields.name: createfromorders
fields.label: Create Lines From Order
fields.help: A process that allows the user to copy lines (products) from an existing document different from the one being copied into. For example,the user can copy lines (products) from an existing Sales Order or Purchase Order.

fields.name: createfrominouts
fields.label: Create Lines From Receipt
fields.help: A process that allows the user to copy lines (products) from an existing document different from the one being copied into. For example,the user can copy lines (products) from an existing Goods Shipment/Receipt.

fields.name: copyFrom
fields.label: Copy Lines
fields.help: Copy lines (products) from an existing Invoice. By selecting any existing past  invoice, the process will copy all lines (products) from it to the one currently  being edited. This process can be used repetitively to copy lines (products) from several invoices into a new one.

fields.name: cProjectId
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

validationRule.code: C_Project.projectstatus in ('OP', 'OR') and (C_Project.c_bpartner_id=@C_BPartner_ID@ or '@IsSOTrx@'='N') or C_Project.c_project_id = @c_project_id@

fields.name: cCostcenterId
fields.label: Cost Center
fields.help: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

fields.name: aAssetId
fields.label: Asset
fields.help: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

fields.name: cCampaignId
fields.label: Sales Campaign
fields.help: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program.  Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign.  You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

fields.name: user1Id
fields.label: 1st Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: user2Id
fields.label: 2nd Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: emEtcopagCopFeedback
fields.label: Copilot Feedback
fields.help: Status informed by Copilot.

fields.name: isSotrx
fields.label: Sales Transaction
fields.help: The Sales Transaction checkbox indicates if this item is a Sales Transaction.

fields.name: datePrinted
fields.label: Date printed
fields.help: Indicates the Date that a document was printed.

fields.name: processing
fields.label: Process Invoice
fields.help: Process Invoice

fields.name: processed
fields.label: Processed
fields.help: The Processed checkbox indicates that a document has been processed.

fields.name: cInvoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.help: The Invoice ID uniquely identifies an Invoice Document.

fields.name: adClientId
fields.label: Client
fields.help: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

fields.name: created
fields.label: Creation Date
fields.help: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

fields.name: isSelfService
fields.label: Self-Service
fields.help: Self-Service allows users to enter data or update their data.  The flag indicates, that this record was entered or created via Self-Service or that the user can change it via the Self-Service functionality.

fields.name: isPrinted
fields.label: Print
fields.help: The Printed checkbox indicates if this document or line will included when printing.

fields.name: line
fields.label: Line No.

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_InvoiceLine WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_InvoiceLine WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@
fields.help: Indicates the unique line for a document.  It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

fields.name: financialInvoiceLine
fields.label: Financial Invoice Line
fields.help: This flag will decide whether we are going to book the invoice line on directly general ledger or not.

fields.name: mProductId
fields.label: Product
fields.help: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

reference.hql:
select e.searchKey as searchKey, e.id as id, plv as priceListVersion, plv.name as priceListVersionName, c.id as currency, pp.priceLimit as priceLimit, e.name as productName, e.uOM as uOM, pp.standardPrice as standardPrice, pp.listPrice as netListPrice, pl.salesPriceList as salesPriceList, e.characteristicDescription as chDescription, gp.name as genericProduct
from PricingProductPrice pp
join pp.product e
join pp.priceListVersion plv
join plv.priceList pl
left join pl.currency c
left join e.genericProduct gp
where e.isGeneric = 'N'
and e.active = 'Y'
and plv.active = 'Y'
  and @additional_filters@

fields.name: accountId
fields.label: Account
fields.help: The (natural) account used

validationRule.code: EnableInFinInvoices = 'Y'

reference.orderBy: Name, CASE WHEN (AD_Org_ID = @AD_Org_ID@) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC

fields.name: aumqty
fields.label: Operative Quantity
fields.help: The number of a certain item involved in the transaction, according to the defined Operative UOM.

fields.name: cAum
fields.label: Alternative UOM
fields.help: The Alternative UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

validationRule.code: td0.c_uom_id IN(select p.c_uom_id from m_product p where p.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@) or td0.c_uom_id IN(select a.c_uom_id from m_product_aum a where a.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@ and ((@IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' and a.sales <> 'NA') OR (@IsSOTrx@ <> 'Y' and a.purchase <> 'NA')))

fields.name: qtyInvoiced
fields.label: Invoiced Quantity
fields.help: The Invoiced Quantity indicates the quantity of a product that have been invoiced.

fields.name: cUomId
fields.label: UOM
fields.help: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

fields.name: priceActual
fields.label: Net Unit Price
fields.help: The actual price indicates the price for a product in source currency.

fields.name: grossUnitPrice
fields.label: Gross Unit Price
fields.help: This is the price that is provided when the price is inclusive of taxes.

fields.name: lineNetAmt
fields.label: Line Net Amount
fields.help: Indicates the line net amount based on the quantity and the actual price.  Any additional charges or freight are not included.

fields.name: lineGrossAmount
fields.label: Line Gross Amount
fields.help: This is the total amount against a line ( i.e product price * quantity + taxes )

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.help: A description is limited to 255 characters.

fields.name: cTaxId
fields.label: Tax
fields.help: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

validationRule.code: C_TAX.VALIDFROM<=COALESCE(@DateInvoiced@,@DateOrdered@) AND (C_TAX.SOPOTYPE =(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN 'S' ELSE 'P' END) OR C_TAX.SOPOTYPE = 'B') AND C_TAX.AD_CLIENT_ID=@AD_CLIENT_ID@ AND C_TAX.C_TAX_ID=(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) THEN (SELECT C_TAX_ID FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) ELSE C_TAX.C_TAX_ID END)

fields.name: priceList
fields.label: List Price
fields.help: The Net List Price is the official price stated by the selected pricelist and the currency of the document.

fields.name: grosspricelist
fields.label: Gross List Price
fields.help: The Gross List Price is the official price stated by the selected tax included pricelist and the currency of the document.

fields.name: mAttributeSetInstanceId
fields.label: Attribute Set Value
fields.help: The values of the actual Product Attributes

fields.name: cOrderLineId
fields.label: Purchase Order Line
fields.help: The Purchase Order Line is a unique identifier for a line in an order.

fields.name: mInOutLineId
fields.label: Goods Receipt Line
fields.help: The Goods Receipt Line indicates a unique line in a Receipt document

fields.name: isDeferred
fields.label: Deferred Expense
fields.help: When flagged expense of the product will be deferred using the plan and the number of periods

fields.name: taxbaseamt
fields.label: Alternate Taxable Amount
fields.help: The total sum on which taxes are added. used as an alternative for tax calculation. As default behavior the value provided will be equal to the line net amount, but can be overwritten.

fields.name: iseditlinenetamt
fields.label: Edit Line Net Amount
fields.help: A flag used to allow the end-user to edit Line Net Amount field.

fields.name: quantityOrder
fields.label: Order Quantity
fields.help: Product quantity in the order uom.

fields.name: mProductUomId
fields.label: Order UOM
fields.help: Alternative order UOM for the product.

fields.name: priceStd
fields.label: Base Net Unit Price
fields.help:
Net unit price before applying this promotion. In case multiple promotions are applied in cascade, this price is the one after applying all promotions with more priority than current one.

This field is populated in case the used price list does not include taxes.

fields.name: defPlanType
fields.label: Expense Plan Type
fields.help: Set the type of plan to be used when deferring expense

fields.name: periodnumber
fields.label: Period Number
fields.help: Set here the number of periods to be used when deferring the revenue

fields.name: cPeriodId
fields.label: Period
fields.help: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

validationRule.code: exists (select 1 from c_year where c_period.c_year_id = c_year.c_year_id and (SELECT AD_InheritedCalendar_ID FROM AD_ORG WHERE AD_Client_ID= @AD_Client_ID@ AND AD_ORG_ID= @AD_Org_ID@) = c_year.c_calendar_id) and periodtype = 'S'

reference.filterExpression: EXISTS (SELECT * FROM C_PeriodControl pc WHERE C_Period.C_Period_ID=pc.C_Period_ID AND pc.PeriodStatus='O')

fields.name: adOrgId
fields.label: Organization
fields.help: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

validationRule.code: AD_ISORGINCLUDED(ad_org.ad_org_id, CASE WHEN (@Parent_AD_Org@ IS NULL OR @Parent_AD_Org@ = '') THEN @AD_ORG_ID@ ELSE @Parent_AD_Org@ END, ad_org.ad_client_id)<>-1 AND IsReady='Y'

fields.name: cBpartnerId
fields.label: Business Partner
fields.help: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact.  This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

fields.name: cProjectId
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

fields.label: Cost Center
fields.help: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

fields.label: Asset
fields.help: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

fields.name: user1Id
fields.label: 1st Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: user2Id
fields.label: 2nd Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: explode
fields.label: Explode
fields.help: This process will explode the product of the selected line.

fields.name: cInvoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.help: The Invoice ID uniquely identifies an Invoice Document.

fields.name: created
fields.label: Creation Date
fields.help: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

fields.name: mOfferId
fields.label: Promotion/Discount
fields.help: Promotion or Discount applied to a particular line (product) automatically by the system.

fields.name: cProjectlineId
fields.label: Project Line
fields.help: The Project Line indicates a unique project line.

fields.name: cInvoiceDiscountId
fields.label: Invoice discount
fields.help: The ID identifies a unique discount for the invoice

fields.name: adClientId
fields.label: Client
fields.help: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

fields.name: isDescription
fields.label: Description Only
fields.help: If a line is Description Only, e.g. Product Inventory is not corrected. No accounting transactions are created and the amount or totals are not included in the document.  This for including descriptional detail lines, e.g. for an Work Order.

fields.name: sResourceAssignmentId
fields.label: Resource Assignment
fields.help: The ID identifies a unique record

fields.name: priceLimit
fields.label: Price Limit
fields.help: The Net Price Limit indicates the lowest price for a product stated in the Price List Currency.

fields.name: cInvoiceLineId
fields.label: Invoice Line
fields.help: The Invoice Line uniquely identifies a single line of an Invoice.

fields.name: isActive
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.name: isactive
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.name: line
fields.label: Line No.

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_INVOICELINETAX WHERE C_INVOICELINE_ID=@C_InvoiceLine_ID@

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_INVOICELINETAX WHERE C_INVOICELINE_ID=@C_InvoiceLine_ID@
fields.help: Indicates the unique line for a document.  It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

fields.help: The Tax Base Amount indicates the base amount used for calculating the tax amount.

fields.label: Tax Amount
fields.help: The Tax Amount displays the total tax amount for a document.

fields.name: cInvoiceLineTaxId
fields.label: InvoiceLineTax
fields.help: Refers to the tax related to a given invoice line.

fields.name: cInvoicelineId
fields.label: Invoice Line
fields.help: The Invoice Line uniquely identifies a single line of an Invoice.

fields.name: cInvoiceId
fields.label: Invoice
fields.help: The Invoice ID uniquely identifies an Invoice Document.

fields.name: adClientId
fields.label: Client
fields.help: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

validationRule.code: AD_Client.AD_Client_ID in (@#User_Client@)

fields.name: adOrgId
fields.label: Organization
fields.help: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

validationRule.code: (@AD_Client_ID@='0' AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0') OR (@AD_Client_ID@!='0' AND ((AD_Org.AD_Client_ID IN (@#User_Client@) AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID IN (@#User_Org@)) OR AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0' AND AD_Org.IsSummary='N'))

fields.name: recalculate
fields.label: Recalculate
fields.help: Recalculate tax when Order or Invoice is processed. Usually taxes are recalculated when the document they are associated to is processed, so if the amounts are manually edited it has any effect. If tax is checked as no recalculate, manually edited amounts will be directly applied.

fields.name: cascade
fields.label: Cascade
fields.help: Indicates if it is applied in an accumulative way or if it is applied to the base amount.

fields.name: isactive
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.help: A description is limited to 255 characters.

fields.name: cCampaignId

fields.help: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program.  Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign.  You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

fields.name: cProjectId
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

fields.name: cSalesregionId
fields.label: Sales Region
fields.help: The Sales Region indicates a specific area of sales coverage.

fields.name: documentNo
fields.label: Document No.
fields.help: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice).  If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

validationRule.code:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FIN_FinAcc_PaymentMethod fapm WHERE FIN_PaymentMethod.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID=fapm.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID
AND fapm.isActive='Y'
AND fapm.Payin_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@FIN_ISRECEIPT@'='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payin_Allow END FROM DUAL)
AND fapm.Payout_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@FIN_ISRECEIPT@'='N' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payout_Allow END FROM DUAL))

fields.name: finFinancialAccountId
fields.label: Financial Account
fields.help: Financial account used to deposit / withdrawal money such as bank accounts or petty cash

validationRule.code: Fin_Financial_Account_ID IN (SELECT Fin_Financial_Account_ID FROM Fin_Finacc_Paymentmethod WHERE Fin_Paymentmethod_ID=@Fin_Paymentmethod_ID@ AND (CASE WHEN @IsReceipt@='Y' THEN Payin_Allow  ELSE Payout_Allow END)='Y' AND isActive='Y')

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.help: Current status of a debt/payment.

validationRule.code: (((@Isreceipt@='Y') AND Value not IN  ('PPM','PWNC')) OR ((@Isreceipt@='N') AND Value not IN ('RPR','RDNC')))

There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records:

fields.name: cCurrencyId
fields.label: Currency
fields.help: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

validationRule.code:
C_Currency.C_Currency_id = 
CASE WHEN @C_Invoice_ID@ is not null THEN (SELECT C_Currency_ID FROM C_Invoice WHERE C_Invoice_ID = COALESCE(@C_Invoice_ID@,'---'))
WHEN @APRM_Finacc_Transaction_V_ID@ is not null THEN (SELECT c_currency_id FROM aprm_finacc_transaction_v WHERE aprm_finacc_transaction_v_id = COALESCE(@APRM_Finacc_Transaction_V_ID@, '---')) 
WHEN @FIN_Finacc_Transaction_ID@ is not null THEN (SELECT c_currency_id FROM fin_finacc_transaction WHERE fin_finacc_transaction_id = COALESCE(@FIN_Finacc_Transaction_ID@, '---'))
WHEN @GL_Journal_ID@ is not null THEN (SELECT c_currency_id FROM gl_journal WHERE gl_journal_id = COALESCE(@GL_Journal_ID@, '---'))
ELSE (SELECT C_Currency_ID FROM FIN_Payment WHERE FIN_Payment_ID = COALESCE(@FIN_Payment_ID@, '---')) END

fields.name: cCurrencyIdTo
fields.label: To Currency
fields.help: The Currency To defines the target currency for this conversion rate.

validationRule.code: C_Currency.C_Currency_id in (SELECT C_Currency_ID FROM C_Acctschema)

fields.help: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.

fields.label: Currency
fields.help: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

fields.name: cPeriodId
fields.label: Period
fields.help: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

fields.name: dateAcct
fields.label: Accounting Date
fields.help: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

fields.name: seqNo
fields.label: Sequence Number
fields.help: The Sequence indicates the order of records

fields.name: accountId
fields.label: Account
fields.help: The (natural) account used

fields.name: acctValue
fields.label: Value
fields.help: Value of the account used in the entry.

fields.name: acctDescription
fields.label: Accounting entry Description
fields.help: Description of the accounting entry

fields.name: amtAcctDr
fields.label: Debit
fields.help: The Account Debit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

fields.name: amtAcctCr
fields.label: Credit
fields.help: The Account Credit Amount indicates the transaction amount converted to this organization's accounting currency

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.help: A description is limited to 255 characters.

fields.name: cBpartnerId
fields.label: Business Partner
fields.help: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact.  This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

fields.name: mProductId
fields.label: Product
fields.help: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

fields.name: cProjectId
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

fields.name: cCostcenterId
fields.label: Cost Center
fields.help: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

fields.name: aAssetId
fields.label: Asset
fields.help: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

fields.name: user1Id
fields.label: 1st Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: user2Id
fields.label: 2nd Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: cTaxId
fields.label: Tax
fields.help: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

fields.name: cCampaignId
fields.label: Sales Campaign
fields.help: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program.  Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign.  You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

fields.name: amtSourceDr
fields.label: Foreign Currency Debit
fields.help: The Source Debit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

fields.name: factAcctType
fields.label: Type
fields.help: Type of entry (Normal, Closing, Opening, Regularization)

fields.name: recordId2
fields.label: Record ID 2
fields.help: Payment the fact refers to.

fields.name: cActivityId
fields.label: Activity
fields.help: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

fields.name: cDoctypeId
fields.label: Document Type
fields.help: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

fields.name: amtSourceCr
fields.label: Foreign Currency Credit
fields.help: The Source Credit Amount indicates the credit amount for this line in the source currency.

fields.name: cLocToId
fields.label: Location to Address
fields.help: The Location To indicates the location that a product was moved to.

fields.name: factAcctGroupId
fields.label: Group ID
fields.help: Accounting entry group ID. Used to group a set of entries

fields.name: adTableId
fields.label: Table
fields.help: The Table indicates the table in which a field or fields reside.

fields.name: glCategoryId
fields.label: G/L Category
fields.help: The General Ledger Category is an optional, user defined method of grouping journal lines.

fields.name: docBaseType
fields.label: Document Category
fields.help: The Document Base Type identifies the base or starting point for a document.  Multiple document types may share a single document base type.

fields.name: dateTrx
fields.label: Transaction Date
fields.help: The Transaction Date indicates the date of the transaction.

fields.name: cLocFromId
fields.label: Location from Address
fields.help: The Location From indicates the location that a product was moved from.

fields.name: adOrgTrxId
fields.label: Trx Organization
fields.help: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization).  The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

fields.name: qty
fields.label: Quantity
fields.help: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

fields.name: cSalesRegionId
fields.label: Sales Region
fields.help: The Sales Region indicates a specific area of sales coverage.

fields.name: lineId
fields.label: Line ID
fields.help: Internal link

fields.name: mLocatorId
fields.label: Storage Bin
fields.help: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

fields.name: cUomId
fields.label: UOM
fields.help: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

fields.name: postingType
fields.label: Posting Type
fields.help: The Posting Type indicates the type of amount (Actual, Encumbrance, Budget) this journal updated.

fields.name: cWithholdingId
fields.label: Withholding
fields.help: The Withholding indicates the type of withholding to be calculated.

entities.hqlOrderByClause: accountingSchema.name, accountingDate, abs(debit) desc, credit desc, value
